name: Keep BPMN conformance inside the owning PR

elements.name: One-PR conformance scope approved
elements.documentation: Historical records remain intact; the procedure changes prospectively to same-PR closeout.

elements.name: Update bpmn-plans boundary
elements.documentation: Make plans end at green PR handoff and move conformance plus Task finalization into same-PR closeout metadata.

elements.name: Enter verification
elements.documentation: Join initial implementation and corrected-delta paths before rerunning all affected checks.

elements.name: Validate Skill and metadata
elements.documentation: Run the Skill validator, parse interface metadata, and inspect trigger/procedure coherence.

elements.name: Exercise one-PR closeout
elements.documentation: Use fresh contexts to test same-PR conformance, changed-after-conformance, and disposition exclusions.

elements.name: Run fresh-context review
elements.documentation: Delegate independent read-only review of the exact implementation and plan artifacts.

elements.name: Implementation green?
elements.documentation: Branch on whether verified material findings remain.

elements.name: Fix in-scope findings
elements.documentation: Apply only the smallest causal corrections and rerun affected checks.

elements.name: Publish the owning PR
elements.documentation: Commit the reviewed planned work, push it, and open its one owning pull request.

elements.name: Owning PR green?
elements.documentation: Use applicable GitHub checks and mergeability as the planned handoff gate.

elements.name: Correct failed PR checks
elements.documentation: Correct only in-scope failures and return through validation and review before republishing.

elements.name: Change green for PR handoff
elements.documentation: The planned implementation is green in its owning PR. Conformance and Task finalization are same-PR closeout metadata outside the BPMN nodes.
